name: Rosemon

signature_move.name: Thorn Whip
signature_move.description: Attack with a high-voltage whip. It can either enslave a Digimon as its devoted servant or electrocute them.

description: A Fairy Digimon with an appearance resembling a rose, it is referred to as the Queen of Flowers . It has the appearance of a beautiful woman, and desires to remain beautiful forever. Its personality is more or less that way, and though it is excessively self-conscious about such things, its true strength does not in fact compare unfavorably with other Ultimates. Also, it wears on its breast a " Tiferet ", a jewel which is engraved with the symbol of love and beauty. This Tiferet that it possesses is said to promise it eternal beauty and power. Its Special Move is taming Digimon, no matter how frenzied, with a thorned whip charged with electricity ( Thorn Whip ). It is said that those that suffer this technique become Rosemon's slave, body and soul. Also, it can bring down the opponent using the whip as a rapier ( Roses Rapier ). Additionally, as for Digimon who suffer Rosemon's ultimate " Forbidden Temptation ", their data is beautifully destroyed in a shower of innumerable rose petals.
